---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for AIRSLICE
title: "[idea] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What's the idea?**
A clear description of what you'd like to see.

**What problem does it solve?**
Why would this make the game better or more fun?

**Alternatives you've considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.

**Keep it simple**
AIRSLICE is intentionally a no-build, vanilla-JS game. Bonus points if your idea
fits that constraint.
